description: DialogLayer: SwiftUI-style isPresented dialogs for Flutter, built on OverlayPortal — dialogs that can only dismiss themselves and can never accidentally pop the route behind them.
Journal of Seasonality — one-click reproduction for "How Far Back to Trust Google Trends: A Reproducible Recent-Tail Fitting-Penalty Diagnostic Across 72 Weekly Search Series" (submission #8)

Nearest undetected stellar-mass black hole to the Sun — a derived estimate with error bars (~10 pc; 5–20 pc). AI research synthesis (RR engine) reproducing published estimates (Fender 2013; Murchikova & Sahu 2025) — medium confidence, not peer-reviewed.
